```{r}
#| label: part-tbl-grants-selected
#| tbl-cap: "Major Research Grants (Selected)"
#| results: asis
grants_selected <- read.csv("../data/Grant_income.csv", check.names = FALSE) %>%
  filter(Type == "Research") %>%
  arrange(desc(Amount)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  mutate(
    Period = ifelse(End == "" | is.na(End),
                    as.character(Start),
                    paste0(Start, "–", End)),
    Amount = scales::comma(Amount, prefix = "£"),
    Source = str_replace_all(Source, fixed("(Department of the Economy NI)"), "DfE NI"),
    Source = str_replace_all(Source, fixed("(UKFin+/EPSRC)"), "UKFin+")
  ) %>%
  select(Source, `My Role`, Period, Title, Amount)

if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
  grants_selected %>%
    knitr::kable(
      col.names = c("Funder", "Role", "Period", "Project", "Costs"),
      align = c("l", "l", "c", "l", "r"),
      format = "latex",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      escape = TRUE,
      longtable = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      font_size = 9,
      latex_options = c("repeat_header", "hold_position")
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width = "2.1cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(2, width = "0.9cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(3, width = "1.4cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "6.8cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(5, width = "1.5cm")
} else {
  grants_selected %>%
    knitr::kable(
      col.names = c("Funder", "Role", "Period", "Project", "Costs"),
      align = c("l", "l", "l", "l", "r"),
      format = "pipe",
      escape = FALSE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
      full_width = TRUE,
      position = "left"
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")
}
```
